name: Amaretto Cheesecake from Loren Martin
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs and melted butter; press evenly over the bottom and sides of a greased 9-inch spring-form pan. Chill.
2. Preheat the oven to 325°F (165°C).
3. Beat together the ricotta cheese and cream cheese until smooth. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
4. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until firm in the center. Remove from the oven and let cool for 30 minutes in the pan.
5. Allow the cheesecake to cool completely, preferably in the refrigerator overnight before serving.
6. Top with fresh fruit or jam before serving.
